title: Soccer Event Poster Redesign

imagePrompts.prompt: You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.
promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.
promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.

You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.

imagePrompts.title: Soccer Event Poster Redesign

prompt: You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.
originalPrompt: You are a premium graphic designer with a human feel. Transform this boring poster and make it a bold and attractive poster for an upcoming soccer event.

promptTranslations.zh: 您是一位具有人情味的高级平面设计师。改变这张无聊的海报，使其成为即将举行的足球赛事的大胆而有吸引力的海报。
promptTranslations.fr: Vous êtes un graphiste haut de gamme à caractère humain. Transformez cette affiche ennuyeuse et faites-en une affiche audacieuse et attrayante pour un prochain événement de football.
promptTranslations.ru: Вы графический дизайнер премиум-класса с человеческим чувством. Преобразите этот скучный плакат и сделайте из него смелый и привлекательный плакат предстоящего футбольного мероприятия.
promptTranslations.pt: Você é um designer gráfico premium com um toque humano. Transforme este pôster chato e torne-o um pôster ousado e atraente para um próximo evento de futebol.
promptTranslations.ja: あなたは人間味のあるプレミアムグラフィックデザイナーです。この退屈なポスターを改造して、今後のサッカー イベントに向けて大胆で魅力的なポスターにしましょう。
promptTranslations.ko: 당신은 인간적인 느낌을 지닌 프리미엄 그래픽 디자이너입니다. 이 지루한 포스터를 변형하여 다가오는 축구 이벤트를 위한 대담하고 매력적인 포스터로 만들어 보세요.
